-- Generated by Oracle SQL Developer And Reforged (Fixed for MySQL)

CREATE TABLE WH_CoreAbilities (
    id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE WH_Fractions (
    id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE WH_Subfractions (
    id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE WH_Units (
    id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    toughness INT NOT NULL,
    wounds INT NOT NULL,
    points INT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE WH_Guesses (
    id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    `date` DATE NOT NULL,
    units_id INT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE WH_Keywords (
    id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE WH_Users (
    id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

-- Junction tables (M:N) with composite primary keys

CREATE TABLE WH_CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT (
    coreabilities_id INT NOT NULL,
    units_id INT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (coreabilities_id, units_id)
);

CREATE TABLE WH_FractionsUnitsCT (
    fractions_id INT NOT NULL,
    units_id INT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (fractions_id, units_id)
);

CREATE TABLE WH_SubfractionsUnitsCT (
    subfractions_id INT NOT NULL,
    units_id INT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (subfractions_id, units_id)
);

CREATE TABLE WH_KeywordsUnitsCT (
    keywords_id INT NOT NULL,
    units_id INT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (keywords_id, units_id)
);

CREATE TABLE WH_UsersGuessesCT (
    users_id INT NOT NULL,
    guesses_id INT NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (users_id, guesses_id)
);

-- Foreign Keys

ALTER TABLE WH_Guesses
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_Guesses_WH_Units_fk FOREIGN KEY (units_id) REFERENCES WH_Units (id);

ALTER TABLE WH_CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT_WH_CoreAbilities_fk FOREIGN KEY (coreabilities_id) REFERENCES WH_CoreAbilities (id),
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_CoreAbilitiesUnitsCT_WH_Units_fk FOREIGN KEY (units_id) REFERENCES WH_Units (id);

ALTER TABLE WH_FractionsUnitsCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_FractionsUnitsCT_WH_Fractions_fk FOREIGN KEY (fractions_id) REFERENCES WH_Fractions (id),
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_FractionsUnitsCT_WH_Units_fk FOREIGN KEY (units_id) REFERENCES WH_Units (id);

ALTER TABLE WH_SubfractionsUnitsCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_SubfractionsUnitsCT_WH_Subfractions_fk FOREIGN KEY (subfractions_id) REFERENCES WH_Subfractions (id),
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_SubfractionsUnitsCT_WH_Units_fk FOREIGN KEY (units_id) REFERENCES WH_Units (id);

ALTER TABLE WH_KeywordsUnitsCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_KeywordsUnitsCT_WH_Keywords_fk FOREIGN KEY (keywords_id) REFERENCES WH_Keywords (id),
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_KeywordsUnitsCT_WH_Units_fk FOREIGN KEY (units_id) REFERENCES WH_Units (id);

ALTER TABLE WH_UsersGuessesCT
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_UsersGuessesCT_WH_Guesses_fk FOREIGN KEY (guesses_id) REFERENCES WH_Guesses (id),
    ADD CONSTRAINT WH_UsersGuessesCT_WH_Users_fk FOREIGN KEY (users_id) REFERENCES WH_Users (id);
